calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Elizabeth McDonald, Esq. appeared for plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, A Bank Chartered Under the Laws of the State of Utah.
No appearance by defendant David M. Salma, an Individual.
Amended Default entered against defendant on May 28, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed on July 21, 2008.
Order waiving appearance of witness at default prove-up hearing was filed on July 22, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff American Express Centurion Bank, A Bank Chartered Under the Laws of the State of Utah, and against the Defaulted Defendant David M. Salma, an Individual as follows:

Damages/Principal - $100,724.42.
Prejudgment Interest - $0.00.
Attorney's Fees - $0.00.
Costs - $403.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $101,127.42.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Continued To Oct-17-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-28-2008 Continued To Aug-01-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
